description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and test. Use the custom Docker image arwash.rdi:5000/lumos:latest for Linux jobs and Windows runner tags for Windows jobs. In the build stage add a build_linux job that runs "cmake -S. -Bbuild -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release" then "cmake --build build --parallel $(nproc)", publishes the binary at build/linux/Release/test/test as an artifact, and runs on runners tagged docker; also add a build_windows job that runs "cmake -S. -Bbuild" then "cmake --build build --config Release --parallel $(nproc)", publishes build/windows/test/Release/test.exe as an artifact, and runs on runners tagged windows_10_builder. In the test stage add a test_linux job that depends on build_linux, runs the built test binary "build/linux/Release/test/test" using the same Docker image on docker‑tagged runners, and a test_windows job that depends on build_windows, runs "./build/windows/test/Release/test.exe" on runners tagged windows_7_tester.
